description: InfluxData documentation assistance via MCP servers

influxdb-docs.comment: Hosted InfluxDB documentation search. Authenticates via Google OAuth on first use. Rate limits: 40 req/hr, 200 req/day.

influxdata.comment: Local Docs MCP server (optional). To install and setup, see https://github.com/influxdata/docs-mcp-server. NOTE: uses deprecated endpoints--pending update.
